---
title: "📊 For hiring/tenure committees"
toc: false
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
---

<!-- Hide the title in the main text -->
```{=html}
<style>
main.content > header#title-block-header {
  display: none !important;
}
</style>
```

::: {.committees-modern}

```{=html}
<section class="cm-hero">
  <div class="cm-hero__content">
    <p class="cm-eyebrow">Committee workflow</p>
    <h2 class="cm-hero__title">Set up RESQUE for your hiring committee in six steps</h2>
    <p class="cm-hero__lead">With a few steps, committees can set up a customized version of the RESQUE tool that fits their needs.</p>
    <div class="cm-hero__actions">
      <!-- <a class="cm-btn cm-btn--primary" href="https://github.com/RESQUE-Framework/collector-app/blob/main/How_to_fork.md">Open the technical setup guide</a> -->
      <a class="cm-btn cm-btn--secondary" href="/includes/demo_profile.html">View demo profile</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

::: {.callout-warning}
The RESQUE Framework is evolving. If you plan to use RESQUE in a hiring process, please [contact us](team.qmd) first.
:::

## Quick start

If you want to use RESQUE in your hiring committee, go through these steps:

```{=html}
<section class="cm-steps-grid">
  <a class="cm-step-card" href="#step-1-choose-your-indicators"><span class="cm-step-card__kicker">Step 1</span><h3>🧩 Choose indicators</h3><p>Select indicators from the core set and the expansion packs.</p></a>
  <a class="cm-step-card" href="#step-2-choose-your-weights"><span class="cm-step-card__kicker">Step 2</span><h3>⚖️ Choose weights</h3><p>Adjust the weights that you want to give to single indicators.</p></a>
  <a class="cm-step-card" href="#step-3-create-your-custom-collector-app-copy"><span class="cm-step-card__kicker">Step 3</span><h3>🛠️ Customize app</h3><p>Create a committee-specific Collector App copy.</p></a>
  <a class="cm-step-card" href="#step-4-publish-applicant-instructions"><span class="cm-step-card__kicker">Step 4</span><h3>📣 Publish instructions</h3><p>Give applicants clear submission rules.</p></a>
  <a class="cm-step-card" href="#step-5-set-up-portal-upload"><span class="cm-step-card__kicker">Step 5</span><h3>📤 Set up upload</h3><p>Ensure your hiring portal accepts the required files.</p></a>
  <a class="cm-step-card" href="#step-6-use-profiles-in-the-committee-meeting"><span class="cm-step-card__kicker">Step 6</span><h3>👥 Use profiles</h3><p>Use profile outputs in structured committee discussions.</p></a>
</section>
```

## Step-by-step setup

### Step 1: Choose your indicators {#step-1-choose-your-indicators}

**Why this matters:** Indicators define what counts as research quality for this position.

**What to decide:**

- Use only the core set, or add expansion packs.
- Keep or deselect indicators that do not match the position profile.

::: {.callout-note title="Default recommendation"}
Start with the core set, then add only those expansion indicators that fit the research culture of the field.
:::

You can inspect both the core packs and the expansion packs in the [Technical documentation](tech_docs.qmd)

### Step 2: Choose your weights {#step-2-choose-your-weights}

**Why this matters:** Some indicators have scores attached, which then are aggregated into category scores across all entered publications. The standard categories displayed in the RESQUE profile are: "Open Data", "Open Materials", "Preregistration","Reproducible Code 6 Verification", and "Methodological Rigor". RESQUE gives you the opportunity to change the weight of each single indicator.


::: {.callout-note title="Default recommendation"}
Changing the individual scores requires a bit more technical expertise and in-depth discussions in the committee. Unless there are good reasons to change a score, we recommend to stay with the default values, which are the result of quite extensive discussions in a large community. The easier way is to fully remove an indicator (see Step 1) if it is not relevant for this position.
:::

### Step 3: Create your custom Collector App copy {#step-3-create-your-custom-collector-app-copy}

**Why this matters:** A custom app version lets you align instructions and chosen indicators with your specific call, and you get a unique link that can be announced in the call.

**What to configure:**

- Intro text and institution-specific wording
- Min/max number of requested publications
- Branding (logo/colors) if desired

Primary guide: [How to fork and customize the Collector App](https://github.com/RESQUE-Framework/collector-app/blob/main/How_to_fork.md)

::: {.callout-warning}
As long as RESQUE is still under development, we offer individual help for setting up the custom app. If you plan to use RESQUE in a hiring process, please [contact us](team.qmd) first.
:::

### Step 4: Publish applicant instructions {#step-4-publish-applicant-instructions}

**Why this matters:** Clear instructions reduce submission errors and follow-up communication.

::: {.panel-tabset}
### Short version

> Das Institut legt Wert auf transparente, belastbare und replizierbare Forschung. Bitte reichen Sie zusätzlich zu den übrigen Unterlagen ein ausgefülltes RESQUE-Profil ein, das in der RESQUE Collector App erstellt werden kann: [CUSTOM LINK]. Die genauen Instruktionen finden sich unter dem angegebenen Link.

### Detailed version

> Das Department Psychologie legt Wert auf transparente, belastbare und replizierbare Forschung. Bitte legen Sie in einem separaten Dokument dar, auf welche Art und Weise Sie diese Ziele bisher verfolgt haben und weiterhin tun werden (Open Science Statement). Darüber hinaus bitten wir Sie, Ihr ausgefülltes RESQUE-Profil, das Sie in der RESQUE Collector App erstellen können ([CUSTOM LINK]), mit den anderen Bewerbungsunterlagen einzureichen. Tragen Sie bitte 10 Publikationen ein und markieren Sie Ihre 3 besten Publikationen. Exportieren Sie Ihre Daten als json-Datei ("Save to file …") und reichen Sie diese mit den anderen Unterlagen ein. Die genauen Instruktionen finden sich unter dem angegebenen Link.

### Alternative wording

> Dem Department ist es wichtig, wissenschaftliche Leistungen in ihrer gesamten Breite zu verstehen, was neben Publikationen zum Beispiel auch veröffentlichte Datensätze und Forschungssoftware beinhaltet. Bewerberinnen und Bewerber werden daher gebeten, statt einer vollständigen Publikationsliste 12 wichtige oder repräsentative wissenschaftliche Arbeiten in der RESQUE Collector App ([CUSTOM LINK]) einzutragen und daraus die 3 besten Arbeiten zu nominieren. Die genauen Instruktionen finden sich unter dem angegebenen Link.
:::

### Step 5: Set up portal upload {#step-5-set-up-portal-upload}

**Why this matters:** The committees collects the json data files from all applicants. These are used to create individual profiles and an overview sheet. Make the submission process as frictionless as possible for the applicants.

::: {.callout-warning title="Common portal issue"}
Some hiring portals do not allow `.json` uploads. If this happens, define a fallback route (e.g., dedicated committee email) and communicate it clearly.
:::

Checklist:

- Portal accepts `.json`
- Backup route is defined if `.json` is blocked
- Instructions explicitly request original `json` file (not the `html` file from the RESQUE Profile Builder, and also not the `json` file converted into a PDF)

### Step 6: Create profiles and use them in the committee meeting {#step-6-use-profiles-in-the-committee-meeting}

**Why this matters:** RESQUE profiles add relevant information about the applicants and support more consistent and transparent discussion.

We currently provide two profiles:

1. **Individual profiles** for each applicant (<a href="/includes/demo_profile.html">View demo profile</a>)
2. **Overview sheet** across applicants (demo)

Committee recommendation:

- Fix weighting and key evaluative dimensions in writing during the first committee session, before you see the applications.

## Checklist

```{=html}
<section class="cm-checklist-card">
  <h3>Before opening the call</h3>
  <ul>
    <li>✅ Custom Collector App created</li>
    <li>✅ File formats and upload route tested (i.e., `json` files can be uploaded in the hiring portal, or alternatively via email)</li>
    <li>✅ Applicant instructions include custom Collector App link</li>
    <li>✅ Committee contact for technical issues defined</li>
    <li>✅ Trial run completed with at least one dummy submission</li>
  </ul>
</section>
```

## Examples and templates

```{=html}
<section class="cm-resource-grid">
  <a class="cm-resource-card" href="includes/job_ads/W3_Eichstaett_EntwicklungPaedagogischePsy.pdf"><h3>Example job ad: Eichstätt (W3)</h3><p>Professur für Entwicklungs- und Pädagogische Psychologie.</p></a>
  <a class="cm-resource-card" href="includes/job_ads/W1_Mainz_KiJu.pdf"><h3>Example job ad: Mainz (W1)</h3><p>Klinische Psychologie und Psychotherapie des Kindes- und Jugendalters.</p></a>
  <a class="cm-resource-card" href="/includes/demo_profile.html"><h3>Demo applicant profile</h3><p>Preview the profile format used in committee review.</p></a>
  <a class="cm-resource-card" href="https://github.com/RESQUE-Framework/collector-app/blob/main/How_to_fork.md"><h3>Collector App customization guide</h3><p>Step-by-step setup for a committee-specific app copy.</p></a>
</section>
```

## Frequently Asked Questions

::: {.faq}

<details class="faq">
<summary><strong>Can RESQUE be gamed?</strong></summary>
Yes. Any evaluation system can be gamed (Goodhart’s law). The practical mitigation strategy is to combine indicator-based structure with a qualitative discussion and human judgement.
</details>

<details class="faq">
<summary><strong>How many publications should we request?</strong></summary>
Use a number that is realistic for applicants and feasible for committee review, and specify how many “best papers” should be nominated. Typically, the 10 best publications are requested for a full professorship position; but this number might be lower for, e.g., junior professorship positions.
</details>

<details class="faq">
<summary><strong>What if our portal blocks `json` uploads?</strong></summary>
Define an explicit fallback submission route (e.g., dedicated committee email) and communicate that only the original `json` file is needed by the committee (not the html report).
</details>

:::

```{=html}
<section class="cm-contact-cta">
  <h2>Planning to use RESQUE in your call?</h2>
  <p>We can help with setup, wording, and process design for your committee.</p>
  <a class="cm-btn cm-btn--primary" href="team.qmd">Contact the RESQUE team</a>
</section>
```

:::
